About Me

Gen Z Strategist.
Born Trend-First.

I started this work before most people my age even knew what a content strategy was. All growth: fully organic, zero paid media.

My Story

Over the past few years I've built social media presences for skincare, perfume, handmade goods, and event brands — mostly from scratch, always organically. As a Gen Z creator, reels, YouTube Shorts, and Snapchat culture is literally how I communicate. I've managed 5 brands simultaneously, grown accounts to 25K+ followers, and built complete brand identities from zero — all without a single rupee spent on paid media. Currently pursuing a 3-year Diploma in Software Engineering, with papers already submitted — because tomorrow's marketers understand both culture AND code.

My Skills

Selected Work

Brands I've Built

From near-zero to thousands of followers — all organic, all strategic, all real.

The Royal Essential

Luxury Perfume Brand · theroyalessential.com

Brand Building From Zero
Took the brand from a completely undefined identity to a fully operational, polished luxury presence. Every single element — from the visual language to the digital footprint — was built from scratch with a clear vision of what a credible, high-end perfume brand should look and feel like.

Visual Brand Language & Identity
Crafted the entire visual identity of the brand from the ground up — including color palette, typography, design style, and overall aesthetic direction. Ensured every visual element communicated luxury, exclusivity, and trust consistently across all touchpoints.

Product Advertising & Ad Suite
Designed and produced a full suite of product ads tailored for digital platforms. Each ad was built to stop the scroll, highlight the product's premium nature, and drive purchase intent — combining strong visuals with compelling creative direction.

Social Media Presence & Content
Established and grew an active social media presence for the brand, creating content that reflected the luxury positioning while remaining engaging and accessible to the target audience. Built the profile from nothing into a credible and aesthetically consistent digital storefront.

Client Reviews & Social Proof
Designed visually appealing client review and testimonial creatives that built trust and credibility for the brand. Turned customer feedback into polished content that reinforced the brand's reputation and encouraged new buyers.

Amável Aura

@amavelaura · Skincare Brand

Account Growth & Turnaround
Took over an existing account at 4.7K followers and grew it to 11.2K — nearly tripling the audience by completely rebuilding the content strategy from the ground up. Identified what wasn't working, overhauled the approach, and delivered consistent, measurable growth.

Content Strategy Rebuild
Audited the existing content and restructured the entire social media strategy to better align with the brand's goals and audience expectations. Shifted the content mix to include a more balanced and purposeful combination of educational, promotional, and brand-building posts.

Brand Voice Definition
Defined and established a clear, consistent brand voice for Amável Aura — one that felt warm, trustworthy, and knowledgeable. Ensured this voice carried through every caption, post, and piece of communication to build a recognizable and reliable brand personality.

Educational Content & Product Ads
Created educational skincare posts that positioned the brand as an authority in its niche, building audience trust and long-term loyalty. Alongside this, designed and produced product ads that were visually compelling and conversion-focused.

Emayaa Store

@emayaaa_store · 100% Handmade Bags · Karachi

Organic Growth Strategy
Built the brand's Instagram presence entirely from scratch using a reels-first content strategy with zero paid media or advertising. Took the account from near-zero followers to a highly engaged community of 25.2K followers purely through strategic, consistent, and creative organic content.

Reels-First Content Approach
Identified short-form video as the primary growth lever for the brand and built an entire content strategy around it. Every reel was crafted with intention — from concept and filming direction to editing and posting timing — to maximize reach and shareability.

Performance & Results
Achieved remarkable results across just 22 posts, averaging 1,145 new followers per post. The top-performing reel alone reached 26.6K views, demonstrating the effectiveness of the content strategy in capturing and retaining audience attention.

Brand Storytelling & Visual Identity
Translated the handmade, artisan nature of the brand into compelling visual content that resonated deeply with the target audience. Ensured every post reflected the brand's authenticity, craftsmanship, and unique personality consistently across the feed.

Community Building
Fostered genuine audience connection by creating content that invited engagement, built trust, and turned casual viewers into loyal followers and potential customers — all without spending a single rupee on promotion.

SK Events & Jaztas

Event Brand · Karachi

Pre-Event Promotion & Content Planning
Developed and executed pre-event promotional content to build anticipation and drive audience turnout. Designed creatives, wrote copy, and scheduled posts strategically across platforms to maximize reach before each event.

Live Social Media Coverage
Handled real-time social media coverage during live events — capturing moments, posting stories, and keeping the audience engaged as events unfolded. Ensured the brand's online presence stayed active and exciting throughout each event day.

Post-Event Recap & Reels
Produced and edited post-event recap reels that highlighted key moments, extended the event's reach beyond attendees, and kept the audience engaged after the event had ended. Focused on storytelling through visuals to strengthen brand recall.

Full Event Lifecycle Management
Managed the complete content and social media lifecycle of events — from the first promotional post to the final recap — ensuring a cohesive and professional brand narrative at every stage.

DROPS.COM

Event Brand · Karachi

Graphic Design & Visual Identity
Designed all visual assets for the brand from the ground up — including social media creatives, event posters, promotional banners, and branded templates. Ensured every piece of content maintained a consistent visual identity that reflected the brand's personality and appealed to its target audience.

Social Media Marketing & Content Strategy
Managed the brand's entire social media presence, creating and scheduling content that drove consistent audience growth and engagement. Developed a content strategy tailored to the brand's voice, ensuring each post served a clear purpose — whether to inform, engage, or convert.

Paid Advertising & Campaign Management
Planned and executed paid ad campaigns with the goal of expanding brand reach and driving conversions. Handled ad creatives, copy direction, and targeting strategies to maximize return and bring in a relevant, engaged audience.

Brand Building & Visibility
Took the brand from concept to a recognizable digital presence. Managed the full process of branding — from defining the visual language to making it consistently visible across platforms — turning Drops.com into a credible and polished brand in its space.

Record Management & Design Documentation
Maintained organized records of all design work, campaign assets, and creative iterations, ensuring smooth workflow continuity and making it easy to track brand evolution over time.
